records.ety: [F. identit, LL. identitas, fr. L. idem the same, from the root of is he, that; cf. Skr. idam this. Cf. Item.]

defs: The state or quality of being identical, or the same; sameness.
quotes: Identity is a relation between our cognitions of a thing, not between things themselves.

defs: The condition of being the same with something described or asserted, or of possessing a character claimed; as, to establish the identity of stolen goods.
